patches.summary: Add dns, domain-lookup, mac-address, and mx-lookup to active-apis.json for CLI discovery.
patches.reason: These four APIs shipped on datpaq.com; generated commands already exist but were hidden from datpaq api, datpaq sample, and splash until their slugs were added to the curated manifest.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli -run TestNewLookupAPIsAreActive passes; datpaq api lists all four interfaces.
